_generated: This file is auto-generated by manifest-gen.ts. Do not edit directly.
name: gallery-dl
description: Download images and media from Pixiv, Instagram, DeviantArt, Danbooru, ExHentai, Patreon, Kemono, and 400+ other sites using gallery-dl
author: TheArchiver

settings.label: Save Directory
settings.description: Top-level folder within your downloads directory for gallery-dl content. Plugin browser views track this folder, so per-site folders are created inside it (default: gallery-dl).

settings.label: Legacy Library Folder
settings.description: Legacy compatibility setting from earlier plugin versions. Its value is migrated to Save Directory automatically.

settings.label: Per-Site Download Folders
settings.description: Assign sites to specific download subfolders. Matched sites are stored inside Save Directory, preserving plugin browser support.

settings.label: 🍪 Cookies File (Global)
settings.description: Upload a Netscape-format cookies.txt file for authenticated downloads. This is used as a fallback for all sites. Many sites (Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Patreon, Fanbox, Fantia, Fur Affinity, ExHentai, etc.) require cookies for access. To export cookies: Chrome → 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY' extension; Firefox → 'cookies.txt' extension. Visit the site, click the extension, export.

settings.label: 🍪 Extract Cookies from Browser
settings.description: Automatically extract cookies from an installed browser instead of a file. gallery-dl will read cookies directly from the browser's cookie store. The browser must be closed for this to work reliably on some systems.

settings.label: 🍪 Browser Profile Name
settings.description: If you use multiple browser profiles, specify the profile name here. Leave blank to use the default profile. Example: 'Profile 1' for Chrome, or your Firefox profile name.

settings.label: 🍪 Cookie Domain Filter
settings.description: Only extract cookies for this domain (e.g., '.instagram.com'). Leave blank to extract all cookies from the browser. Useful for limiting which cookies are sent to gallery-dl.

settings.label: Pixiv — Refresh Token
settings.description: Pixiv REQUIRES authentication. Use the 'Authenticate Pixiv' button below to open the OAuth flow in your browser. The refresh token will be saved automatically. Alternatively, paste a token from `gallery-dl oauth:pixiv` here.

settings.label: Authenticate Pixiv (OAuth)
settings.description: Opens the Pixiv OAuth flow. Follow the browser prompts to authorize gallery-dl, then paste the code back. Your refresh token will be stored securely.

settings.label: DeviantArt — Refresh Token
settings.description: Optional OAuth token for DeviantArt. Enables access to mature content and higher quality originals. Use the button below or run `gallery-dl oauth:deviantart`.

settings.label: DeviantArt — Client ID
settings.description: Optional: your own DeviantArt API application Client ID. Only needed if you want to use your own app credentials instead of the built-in ones.

settings.label: DeviantArt — Client Secret
settings.description: Optional: your own DeviantArt API application Client Secret.

settings.label: Authenticate DeviantArt (OAuth)
settings.description: Opens the DeviantArt OAuth flow in your browser.

settings.label: Flickr — Access Token
settings.description: Optional OAuth token for Flickr. Enables access to private/restricted content. Use the button below or run `gallery-dl oauth:flickr`.

settings.label: Flickr — Access Token Secret
settings.description: The access token secret from the Flickr OAuth flow.

settings.label: Authenticate Flickr (OAuth)
settings.description: Opens the Flickr OAuth flow in your browser.

settings.label: Tumblr — Access Token
settings.description: Optional OAuth token for Tumblr. Use the button below or run `gallery-dl oauth:tumblr`.

settings.label: Tumblr — Access Token Secret
settings.description: The access token secret from the Tumblr OAuth flow.

settings.label: Authenticate Tumblr (OAuth)
settings.description: Opens the Tumblr OAuth flow in your browser.

settings.label: SmugMug — Access Token
settings.description: OAuth token for SmugMug. Run `gallery-dl oauth:smugmug` to obtain.

settings.label: SmugMug — Access Token Secret
settings.description: The access token secret from the SmugMug OAuth flow.

settings.label: Mastodon — Instance URL
settings.description: Your Mastodon instance URL (e.g., 'mastodon.social', 'pawoo.net'). Needed to authenticate with the correct server.

settings.label: Mastodon — Access Token
settings.description: Access token for your Mastodon instance. Run `gallery-dl oauth:mastodon:<instance>` to obtain.

settings.label: Sankaku — Username
settings.description: Sankaku Channel username. Note: cookies do NOT work for Sankaku — you must use username/password authentication.

settings.label: Sankaku — Password
settings.description: Your Sankaku Channel password.

settings.label: Nijie — Username (Required for Nijie)
settings.description: Nijie requires login to access any content.

settings.label: Nijie — Password
settings.description: Your Nijie account password.

settings.label: Inkbunny — Username
settings.description: Inkbunny username for accessing restricted content.

settings.label: Inkbunny — Password
settings.description: Your Inkbunny password.

settings.label: MangaDex — Username
settings.description: MangaDex username for accessing your follows and reading lists.

settings.label: MangaDex — Password
settings.description: Your MangaDex password.

settings.label: SubscribeStar — Username
settings.description: SubscribeStar username.

settings.label: SubscribeStar — Password
settings.description: Your SubscribeStar password.

settings.label: Newgrounds — Username
settings.description: Newgrounds username for adult content access.

settings.label: Newgrounds — Password
settings.description: Your Newgrounds password.

settings.label: Zerochan — Username
settings.description: Zerochan username for higher resolution downloads.

settings.label: Zerochan — Password
settings.description: Your Zerochan password.

settings.label: Aryion (Eka's Portal) — Username
settings.description: Aryion username.

settings.label: Aryion — Password
settings.description: Your Aryion password.

settings.label: Tapas — Username
settings.description: Tapas username for accessing purchased content.

settings.label: Tapas — Password
settings.description: Your Tapas password.

settings.label: Danbooru — Username
settings.description: Danbooru username (used with API key for authentication).

settings.label: Danbooru — API Key
settings.description: Danbooru API key. Find it in your Danbooru profile settings under API Key. Used as the password with your username.

settings.label: e621 — Username
settings.description: e621 username (used with API key for authentication).

settings.label: e621 — API Key
settings.description: e621 API key. Find it in your e621 account settings. Used as the password with your username.

settings.label: Gelbooru — API Key
settings.description: Gelbooru API key for higher rate limits. Found in your Gelbooru account settings.

settings.label: Gelbooru — User ID
settings.description: Your Gelbooru numeric User ID (used alongside API key).

settings.label: Civitai — API Key
settings.description: Civitai API key for downloading models and accessing NSFW content. Generate one at civitai.com → Account Settings → API Keys.

settings.label: Wallhaven — API Key
settings.description: Wallhaven API key for accessing NSFW wallpapers. Find it at wallhaven.cc → Settings → API.

settings.label: Weasyl — API Key
settings.description: Weasyl API key. Generate one at weasyl.com → Settings → Manage API Keys.

settings.label: Imgur — Client ID
settings.description: Optional Imgur API Client ID for higher rate limits. Register an app at api.imgur.com/oauth2/addclient.

settings.label: Discord — Bot Token
settings.description: Discord bot token for downloading from Discord channels. Create a bot at discord.com/developers/applications.

settings.label: Fansly — Authorization Token
settings.description: Fansly authorization token. Extract from browser DevTools: Network tab → any fansly.com request → 'authorization' header value.

settings.label: Gofile — API Token
settings.description: Gofile API token for accessing premium content.

settings.label: ImageChest — Access Token
settings.description: ImageChest API access token.

settings.label: Pixiv — Download Ugoira Animations
settings.description: Download Pixiv ugoira (animated) posts as frame sequences.

settings.label: Pixiv — Ugoira Conversion Format
settings.description: Convert ugoira animations to video format. Requires FFmpeg. Leave as 'None' to keep as zip of frames.

settings.label: DeviantArt — Mature Content
settings.description: Access mature/NSFW content on DeviantArt (requires authentication).

settings.label: DeviantArt — Download Originals
settings.description: Download original full-resolution files instead of scaled versions.

settings.label: Instagram — Content Types
settings.description: Comma-separated list of content to download: posts, stories, highlights, tagged, reels. Default: 'posts' only. Example: 'posts,stories,reels'

settings.label: ExHentai — Request Delay
settings.description: Seconds to wait between requests to ExHentai (avoids IP bans). Recommended: '2.0-4.8' (random delay in that range). Default is no delay.

settings.label: Kemono — Favorites Only
settings.description: Only download posts you have favorited on Kemono.

settings.label: Kemono — Include Comments
settings.description: Download comment data alongside posts.

settings.label: Skip Existing Files
settings.description: How to handle files that already exist. 'Skip' checks if file exists; 'Abort after N' stops the entire download after N consecutive skips (useful for incremental updates).

settings.label: Use Download Archive
settings.description: Track downloaded files in a SQLite database to avoid re-downloading. More reliable than filename-based skip detection. The archive is stored next to your downloads.

settings.label: File Filter Expression
settings.description: Python expression to filter which files to download. Examples: 'extension in ("jpg","png")' to only get images, 'width >= 1920' for HD+ only, 'filesize < 50000000' for files under 50MB. Leave blank to download everything.

settings.label: Post Filter Expression
settings.description: Python expression to filter which posts to process. Examples: 'score >= 100' for popular content, 'date >= datetime(2024, 1, 1)' for recent posts. Leave blank to process all posts.

settings.label: File Range
settings.description: Download only specific file indices. Examples: '1-10' for first 10, '1,3,5' for specific files, '5-' for 5th onward.

settings.label: Post/Image Range
settings.description: Process only specific post indices. Works like File Range but at the post level. Useful for paginated galleries.

settings.label: Request Delay (seconds)
settings.description: Minimum wait between page/API requests. Helps avoid rate limiting. Can be a number (e.g., '1.5') or a range ('1.0-3.0' for random delay). Leave blank for no delay.

settings.label: Download Delay (seconds)
settings.description: Wait between file downloads. Can be a number or range. Useful for sites that rate-limit downloads separately from pages.

settings.label: Download Speed Limit
settings.description: Maximum download speed. Examples: '1M' for 1 MB/s, '500k' for 500 KB/s. Leave blank for unlimited.

settings.label: Retry Count
settings.description: Number of times to retry failed downloads. Default: 4. Set to -1 for infinite retries.

settings.label: HTTP Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Timeout for HTTP requests in seconds. Default: 30.

settings.label: Proxy URL
settings.description: HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS proxy URL. Examples: 'http://proxy:8080', 'socks5://user:pass@proxy:1080'. Some sites may require a proxy for access.

settings.label: Browser Emulation
settings.description: Emulate browser headers (User-Agent, Accept, etc.) to avoid detection. Some sites block non-browser requests.

settings.label: Write Metadata JSON
settings.description: Save a .json metadata file alongside each downloaded file. Contains source URL, tags, description, upload date, and other site-specific metadata.

settings.label: Write Tag Files
settings.description: Save tags to a separate .txt file per image (one tag per line). Useful for tagging systems and AI training datasets.

settings.label: Write NFO Sidecar
settings.description: Generate a .nfo XML sidecar file with metadata for media managers (Kodi, Jellyfin, etc.).

settings.label: Archive Manga as CBZ
settings.description: Automatically archive manga/comic chapters into .cbz files after download. CBZ is the standard comic book archive format supported by most readers.

settings.label: Preserve Modification Time
settings.description: Set each file's modification time to match the server's Last-Modified header or upload date. Keeps your files chronologically sorted.

settings.label: Execute Command After Download
settings.description: Shell command to run after each file download. Use {} for the file path, {_directory} for the directory. Example: 'optipng {}' to optimize PNGs after download.

settings.label: Directory Template
settings.description: gallery-dl format string for organizing download directories. Default: '{category}/{subcategory}/{title|"unknown"}'. Available fields depend on the site (e.g., {category}, {subcategory}, {user}, {title}, {date}). Leave blank for gallery-dl's built-in defaults.

settings.label: Filename Template
settings.description: gallery-dl format string for naming files. Default varies by site. Examples: '{num:>03}_{filename}.{extension}', '{date:%Y-%m-%d}_{id}.{extension}'. Leave blank for gallery-dl's built-in defaults.

settings.label: Custom gallery-dl Config File
settings.description: Upload a full gallery-dl.conf JSON file for advanced configuration. Settings from this file are MERGED with the plugin settings above — plugin settings take precedence for any overlapping keys. Use this for complex site-specific configurations not covered by the settings above.

settings.label: Extra gallery-dl Arguments
settings.description: Additional command-line arguments passed directly to gallery-dl. Example: '--no-mtime --verbose'. These are appended to the generated command and override other settings.

settings.label: Custom User-Agent
settings.description: Override the User-Agent header for all requests. Leave blank to use gallery-dl's default or the browser emulation setting.

settings.label: Verify SSL Certificates
settings.description: Verify SSL certificates for HTTPS requests. Disable only if you know what you're doing.

settings.label: Verbose Logging
settings.description: Enable verbose/debug output from gallery-dl. Useful for troubleshooting.
